entries.reason: The implementation changes one command branch before path resolution; the test exercises the same CLI boundary; Design SSOT links all three design documents under one root. Splitting would separate the contract from its proof.
entries.note: Advisory precedent only; matching this fingerprint never auto-closes future gates.
